summary: Iteration 16 - TradingView API Integration Testing Complete. All 15 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend verified all new TradingView features: technical_summary, risk_level, and TradingView consensus data in signals.

backend: GET http://127.0.0.1:8099/health returns ok with 56 symbols mapped SUCCESS
GET http://127.0.0.1:8099/ta/bitcoin returns timeframes with overall/oscillators/moving_averages ratings SUCCESS
GET http://127.0.0.1:8099/ta/eurusd returns valid forex data SUCCESS
GET http://127.0.0.1:8099/ta/reliance returns valid Indian stock data SUCCESS
GET http://127.0.0.1:8099/ta/unknown_asset returns error for unknown asset SUCCESS
TradingView rating values are within expected range (-2 to 2) SUCCESS
Signal generation for crypto includes TradingView data SUCCESS
Signal generation for forex includes TradingView data SUCCESS
Signal generation for Indian stock includes TradingView data SUCCESS
Generated signal has technical_summary field SUCCESS
Generated signal has risk_level field (LOW/MEDIUM/HIGH) SUCCESS
Login still works after TradingView integration SUCCESS
Market live data still works SUCCESS
Trading modes endpoint still works SUCCESS
frontend: Signals page loads with all signal cards SUCCESS
Signal cards show risk_level badge (Low Risk) SUCCESS
Signal cards show trading_mode badge (Swing, Position, Day Trading) SUCCESS
Signal cards show technical analysis in TRADE LOGIC section SUCCESS
Signal cards show TradingView consensus in SIGNAL TRIGGER section SUCCESS
Signal cards show confluence score (5/6) SUCCESS
Signal generation UI shows all controls (Market, Asset, Strategy, Timeframes, Trading Mode, TP Levels) SUCCESS
No error messages on signals page SUCCESS

signal_generation_with_tv.tv_data_in_prompt: TradingView consensus and indicator values injected into AI prompt
signal_generation_with_tv.backend_log: TV analysis fetched for {asset_id}: {bias} logged during signal generation

seed_data_creation: Generated test signals during testing (Bitcoin, Ethereum, GBP/USD, TCS signals with TradingView data)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 16 verified TradingView API integration: 1) Node.js TradingView service running on port 8099 (supervisor-managed as tv_service). 2) /ta/{assetId} endpoint returns technical analysis with timeframes (1m-1M), oscillators, moving_averages, overall ratings, and summary with bias/confluence. 3) Signal generation fetches TV data via httpx.AsyncClient and injects into AI prompt. 4) Generated signals now include technical_summary (RSI, MACD, EMA values) and risk_level (LOW/MEDIUM/HIGH). 5) Backend logs 'TV analysis fetched for {asset_id}: {bias}' during signal generation. 6) Frontend displays risk_level badge, trading_mode badge, and TradingView consensus in TRADE LOGIC and SIGNAL TRIGGER sections. All APIs are LIVE (no mocking).
